name: Almond Jade Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 8 cups assorted vegetables (carrots, broccoli, red & green peppers, zucchini, crookneck squash, and green beans)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 1/2 cup whole blanched almonds in a large nonstick skillet over medium heat until lightly browned.
2. Remove garlic after 4 minutes using a slotted spoon.
3. Add remaining oil to the skillet and increase heat to high.
4. Add vegetables (carrots, broccoli, red & green peppers, zucchini, crookneck squash, and green beans) and stir-fry for about 5 minutes until crisp-tender.
5. Reduce heat to medium and add soy sauce.
6. Mix cornstarch, salt, pepper, and sesame oil in a small bowl. Stir thoroughly.
7. Combine the mixture with almonds and pour over the vegetables.
8. Serve on four plates with cooked brown rice. Makes 4 servings.
